title: Ore Borders
description: Adds borders around all ores to improve visibility
body:
![ORE BORDERS TITLE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2117d04f6068c55485c20a091800252895e4ccc.png) 


![Ores Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e1e73f0f5d363ae57a3deec347af885822495fb.png)


Description: The Ore Borders texture pack adds a matching outline around each ore to add better visiblity and stay stylish. This pack will help you find those pesky diamonds while mainting their clean look at the same time.
